_README: BIBLE IDENTITÉ — Julie. Surface d'édition (Remy parle, Claude édite). Le style/cadrage/negatives partagés vivent dans ../../_system/kit.json. Cette bible est COMPILÉE vers setup.md (le seul fichier uploadé dans ChatGPT). Les états sont des DELTAS : ils ne répètent jamais l'identité (portée par l'image master).

meta.purpose: anime wellness app avatar — full-pose state pack (one sprite per cycle state)
meta.source_type: canonical text-only character bible, no external visual reference required
meta.render_goal: consistent reusable avatar across 10 cycle states; identity locked, only expression/pose/props/body-state vary

identity.name: Julie
identity.sexualization_baseline: non-sexualized by default; the 'seductive' state (j13-14) is an explicit, scoped exception (mildly suggestive, still tasteful and clothed)

face.jawline: slightly square jawline softened in anime style
face.cheeks: soft full cheeks with natural volume
face.face_width: balanced face width with a slightly fuller lower face

nose.shape: small natural nose with soft bridge and rounded tip
nose.style: simple anime nose, visible but minimal

skin.finish: smooth anime skin with subtle warmth
skin.rule: clean bare skin on legs and thighs. No tattoos, no writing, no marks, no body art.

hair.color: warm champagne blonde to soft beige blonde
hair.style: very long loose wavy anime hair
hair.texture: silky smooth hair with natural S-shaped waves and soft flowing strands
hair.length: very long, flowing past the waist when visible
hair.wave_level: clearly wavy, soft and voluminous, not straight, not tight curls
hair.face_visibility: hair must frame the face without covering the eyes
hair.brand_accessory: wide lilac headband, clearly visible and consistent across all variants

ear_piercings.description: multiple ear piercings: several thin small hoops and tiny studs arranged around each ear
ear_piercings.density: many piercings, but delicate and lightweight — never cluttered or heavy
ear_piercings.visibility: clearly visible yet discreet, a subtle stack rather than a statement piece

body.silhouette: soft curvy anime-inspired feminine silhouette, wholesome and app-friendly
body.overall_shape: pear-hourglass hybrid: softly defined waist, gently wide hips, full soft thighs, balanced upper body
body.shoulders: soft natural shoulders, slightly narrower than hips

bust.shape: soft modest natural bust under a fitted cozy sweater
bust.emphasis: not emphasized, minimal projection, no cleavage, no boob-focused anatomy
bust.cyclic_variation: subtle swelling allowed in luteal/PMS only, but the bust must remain modest and never become medium-full, large, oversized, or sexualized

waist.constraint: visible waist curve but not tiny, not corset-like

hips.constraint: wide enough to feel curvy, not extreme

proportions.upper_to_lower_balance: lower body slightly fuller than upper body
proportions.sexualization_level: none by default. Ovulation only: nipples faintly pointing through the sweater on 'confiante' (05, subtle) and clearly on 'seductive' (06, marked) — aroused but fully clothed, no exposed skin. Limited to these 2 states. 'seductive' also allows mildly suggestive posing.

outfit.top: fitted pastel lilac ribbed knit mock-neck top
outfit.top_fit: close-fitting on torso, waist and arms, lightly following the bust without emphasizing it
outfit.collar: short soft standing mock-neck collar, slightly higher than crew neck, not a bulky turtleneck
outfit.fabric: thin stretchy ribbed knit with subtle vertical rib texture
outfit.bottom: short white pleated skirt with clean anime folds
outfit.socks: white cotton knee-high socks, tight-fitting, smooth, rising below the knees
outfit.footwear_color_rule: shoes and socks entirely white, clean and minimal
accessories: sneaky little flowers sometimes on the hair or top of the ears

locks: champagne blonde wavy hair + length + lilac headband
small modest bust + base body proportions + hip width
outfit: lilac ribbed mock-neck top + white pleated skirt + white knee-high socks + white high-top sneakers (NEVER changed, no added garments)
full-body framing + lighting family + background + art style

states.expression: épuisée, yeux mi-clos, sourcils légèrement froncés, bouche tombante, peau un peu pâle
states.posture: voûtée vers l'avant, épaules rentrées, une main pressée sur le bas-ventre (crampes)
states.props: une larme discrète au coin de l'œil

states.posture: commence à se déplier, épaules qui se relâchent

states.props: aucun (nipples faiblement marqués sous le pull, subtil)
cœurs qui flottent (nipples nettement marqués sous le pull)

states.posture: tendue, poing serré sur la hanche
states.props: veines de colère anime (pop-veins) ; corps un peu gonflé

state_negative_note: État 06 (séductrice) lève les bans de pose pin-up pour permettre une cambrure suggestive, mais GARDE nudity / topless / nipples exposed / explicit / revealing-outfit / oversized-breast.
